content:
大洞經云白炁「穿尾閭穴，夾脊，上入泥丸」。[[夾脊]]為神炁上行之要途，與[[尾閭穴]]相接，為[[三關]]之一。

  **所出**：《上清大洞真經 · 14章》 — https://zh.wikisource.org/wiki/上清大洞真經/14章
summary: In Taoist practice, 夾脊 (Jiaji) is a crucial energy pathway that facilitates the ascent of spirit and qi, connecting with the tailbone point and forming one of the three key barriers in the body.
title: 夾脊
